reasoning: The market price on October 16, 2025, was 3%, strongly indicating no invasion had commenced by that time and no massive troop buildup (which would be required for a ground invasion intended to 'establish control over any portion of Iran') was underway. Given the extremely high logistical and political barriers to a US invasion of Iran, the short window remaining in 2025 (less than 2.5 months), and the historical preference of the US to use airstrikes rather than ground invasions in the region, the probability remains very low. I align my forecast with the market estimate.
